response.justification: Candidate has ~14 years of professional software development experience spanning full-stack web, with directly relevant recent work in TypeScript/Node.js and React at multiple companies. Recent role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD), plus experience with MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and Java. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited evidence of Kotlin, and no clear PostgreSQL depth, but the overall profile aligns strongly with the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience in current role
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in stated stack
Kotlin experience not demonstrated; Java exposure appears limited and dated
Cloud platform experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure signal

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
Missing Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin signal
